text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Stakes is 1,800 meters... But
compared to the races to come, it's on the shorter
side!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With this speed of mine, I should be able to finish
it in no time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've got this win in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll win this, and then go for the Satsuki Sho. And
after that, it's the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is just me getting my feet wet before the
Classics! I just gotta give it my all!
choice_data_list:
Remember, getting into those races will hinge
on your results.

Remember, getting into those races will hinge
on your results.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have certainly not forgotten! To get the results I
want, I need to focus on sprints this year, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But I have no doubts! There's no way I will lose!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You better look forward to seeing my victory lap!
